---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.hero-banner}
# *Himanshu Goel*

::: {.tagline}
Computational Scientist · Drug Design · AI/ML · Cheminformatics · Bioinformatics  
📍 Ellicott City, MD · [hgchemical@gmail.com](mailto:hgchemical@gmail.com) · [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=YOUR_SCHOLAR_ID&hl=en&sortby=pubdate)
:::

::: {.badge-row}
[🧬 Computational Drug Discovery]{.hero-badge}
[🤖 Agentic AI / LLM]{.hero-badge}
[🧪 Toxicogenomics]{.hero-badge}
[📊 Cheminformatics]{.hero-badge}
[🔬 Bioinformatics]{.hero-badge}
[⚙️ Molecular Dynamics]{.hero-badge}
:::
:::

::: {.stats-row}
::: {.stat-card}
[7+]{.number}
[Years Experience]{.label}
:::
::: {.stat-card}
[15]{.number}
[Publications]{.label}
:::
::: {.stat-card}
[20+]{.number}
[Conference Talks]{.label}
:::
::: {.stat-card}
[10+]{.number}
[Python Repos]{.label}
:::
:::

---

## About me

I'm a computational scientist with 7+ years of interdisciplinary experience spanning computational chemistry, biology, and toxicology. My work sits at the intersection of **AI/ML**, **drug discovery**, and **translational safety research**.

Most recently I was a Computational Research Scientist II at [BHSAI / Henry M. Jackson Foundation](https://www.hjf.org/) (Frederick, MD), working on DoD, DTRA, NIH, and AFRL funded projects. Before that I was a postdoctoral researcher in [Dr. Alex MacKerell's CADD Center](https://www.outerbanks.umaryland.edu/mackerell/) at the University of Maryland, Baltimore, where I developed and applied the [SILCS technology](https://silcsbio.com/) for protein-ligand binding and drug design.

**I'm currently open to new opportunities** in computational drug discovery, AI/ML for life sciences, or research scientist roles. [Get in touch →](mailto:hgchemical@gmail.com)

→ [See my full education & research journey](education.qmd)  
→ [15 publications on Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=YOUR_SCHOLAR_ID&hl=en&sortby=pubdate)

---

## Expertise

::: {.expertise-grid}
[Computer-Aided Drug Design]{.expertise-pill}
[Machine Learning / Deep Learning]{.expertise-pill}
[Graph Neural Networks]{.expertise-pill}
[LLM / Transformer models]{.expertise-pill}
[Agentic AI / LangGraph / RAG]{.expertise-pill}
[Generative AI for molecules]{.expertise-pill}
[RNA-Seq / Toxicogenomics]{.expertise-pill}
[Molecular Dynamics]{.expertise-pill}
[Monte Carlo Simulations]{.expertise-pill}
[DFT / Quantum Chemistry]{.expertise-pill}
[ADMET Profiling]{.expertise-pill}
[Cheminformatics / RDKit]{.expertise-pill}
[Multi-Electrode Array (MEA)]{.expertise-pill}
[MultiOMICS]{.expertise-pill}
[Python · R · Fortran · C++]{.expertise-pill}
:::

---

## Latest tutorials

::: {.tutorial-grid}

::: {.tutorial-card}
[🧬]{.card-emoji}
#### Drug Design & CADD
Virtual screening, molecular docking, SILCS FragMaps, pharmacophore modeling, and SAR analysis with Python.
[Browse tutorials →](tutorials/drug-design.qmd)
:::

::: {.tutorial-card}
[⚗️]{.card-emoji}
#### Cheminformatics
RDKit from scratch, fingerprints, similarity search, SMARTS patterns, chemical space visualization.
[Browse tutorials →](tutorials/cheminformatics.qmd)
:::

::: {.tutorial-card}
[🧫]{.card-emoji}
#### Bioinformatics & RNA-Seq
DESeq2, differential expression, pathway analysis, in vitro–in vivo correlation, cross-species analysis.
[Browse tutorials →](tutorials/bioinformatics.qmd)
:::

::: {.tutorial-card}
[🤖]{.card-emoji}
#### Agentic AI
Building AI agents with LangGraph, LangChain, RAG pipelines, and tool-calling LLMs applied to science.
[Browse tutorials →](tutorials/agentic-ai.qmd)
:::

::: {.tutorial-card}
[📊]{.card-emoji}
#### ML & Multimodal
GNNs, transformers for molecules, transfer learning, DeepChem, PyTorch for life-science tasks.
[Browse tutorials →](tutorials/ml-multimodal.qmd)
:::

:::

---

## Selected publications

::: {.pub-entry}
[2024]{.pub-year} &nbsp;
[Probing liver injuries induced by thioacetamide in human *in vitro* pooled hepatocyte experiments]{.pub-title}  
[Goel H et al. *Int. J. Mol. Sci.* 2024, 25, 3265]{.pub-journal}
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[2024]{.pub-year} &nbsp;
[Modeling Ligand Binding Site Water Networks with SILCS: Impact on Ligand Binding Orientations and Relative Binding Affinities]{.pub-title}  
[Kumar A, **Goel H**, Yu W et al. *J. Chem. Theory Comput.* 2024, 20, 11032–11048]{.pub-journal}
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[2022]{.pub-year} &nbsp;
[hERG Blockade prediction by combining SILCS and Physicochemical Properties]{.pub-title}  
[**Goel H**, Yu W, MacKerell Jr. AD. *Chemistry* 2022, 4, 630–646]{.pub-journal}
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[2021]{.pub-year} &nbsp;
[Rapid and Accurate Estimation of Protein–Ligand Relative Binding Affinities using SILCS]{.pub-title}  
[**Goel H**, Hazel A, Ustach V et al. *Chem. Sci.* 2021, 12, 8844–8858]{.pub-journal}
:::

[View all 15 publications →](research.qmd)
